transcription.text: all over the world the word for great coffee flavor is nescafe we're the world's favorite brand of instant coffees in america nescafe's great flavor comes two ways we're the world's best selling tool nescafe regular in the red label if nescafe can please the whole wide world and now nescafe decaffeinated in the green label we can sure please you same kind of flavor nescafe regular nescafe decaffeinated what's your pleasure
